etymology.description: 糸(糸) (mì, "rope") + 㡭(㡭) (jì) = silk thread + phonetic 㡭 -> continue
etymology.interpretation: 繼(繼) (jì, "continue") combines the semantic element of 糸(糸) (mì, "rope"), representing continuity and connection, with the phonetic element 㡭(㡭) (jì), to convey the concept of following or succeeding through a continued thread.
etymology.simplification: In simplified form 继(繼), the radical 糹(糸, "rope") was replaced with 纟(纟), reflecting a reduction in stroke count while maintaining the phonetic element.

examples.chinese: 他决定要继承家族事业(他決定要繼承家族事業)。
examples.pinyin: Tā juédìng yào jìchéng jiāzú shìyè.
examples.english: He decided to inherit the family business.

examples.chinese: 我们会继续努力(我們會繼續努力)，直到成功(直到成功)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen huì jìxù nǔlì, zhídào chénggōng.
examples.english: We will continue working hard until we succeed.

examples.chinese: 他继去年夺冠后(他繼去年奪冠後)，再次赢得比赛(再次贏得比賽)。
examples.pinyin: Tā jì qùnián duóguàn hòu, zàicì yíngdé bǐsài.
examples.english: After winning the championship last year, he won the match again.
